title: Phase 3: Create internal/tree
description: Move Tree, Node, TreeCursor and all their methods from root tree.go and tree_cursor.go into internal/tree/. This includes S-expression rendering (writeSExprSubtree, MISSING/UNEXPECTED handling), child traversal, field lookup, and the TreeCursorEntry type. The new package imports internal/core, internal/subtree, and language/. Root package replaces implementations with type aliases to internal/tree types. Move tree_test.go and tree_cursor_test.go into internal/tree/. See docs/package-restructure-design.md Phase 3.
